source.name: Dark neon Liquid Glass implementation parameters
source.license_notes: Original implementation guidance distilled from local dark Liquid Glass reference and Claude Code test gaps.

layout_rules: Use dark neon glass as an accent or premium area, not the default surface for the whole page.
Keep text white or near-white and use muted gray only for secondary copy with sufficient contrast.
Place neon glints near edges/corners and icon rings, not directly behind body text.
Pair dark neon with lighter surrounding surfaces so it reads as intentional emphasis.
accessibility_notes: Use text colors around #F8FAFC or #FFFFFF for primary labels on dark glass.
Avoid relying on cyan/magenta glow as the only selected/success indicator.
Check contrast after backdrop blur because background color can bleed through.
implementation_hints: Base dark glass: rgba(8,10,16,0.68) to rgba(8,10,16,0.78); strong default rgba(8,10,16,0.72).
Secondary dark glass: rgba(15,23,42,0.58) to rgba(15,23,42,0.70).
Backdrop filter: blur(18px) saturate(160%) for cards; blur(24px) saturate(180%) for hero/premium surfaces.
White rim: border 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18) to rgba(255,255,255,0.32); hover can rise to 0.42.
Cyan glint: rgba(34,211,238,0.28) to rgba(34,211,238,0.46), usually radial-gradient at top-left or icon edge.
Magenta glint: rgba(217,70,239,0.22) to rgba(217,70,239,0.40), usually bottom-right or active ring.
Orange glint: rgba(251,146,60,0.16) to rgba(251,146,60,0.32), use sparingly for warm caustic highlights.
Inset gloss: inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.22), inset 0 -1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.35).
Neon active ring: box-shadow 0 0 0 1px rgba(34,211,238,0.38), 0 0 24px rgba(217,70,239,0.24).
Pressed state: reduce translateY by 1px, increase inset dark shadow, and slightly reduce outer glow.
Disabled state: background rgba(15,23,42,0.38), border rgba(255,255,255,0.12), text rgba(248,250,252,0.45), remove neon glints.

quality.notes: Added after Claude Code reported dark-neon needed finer color/glow values.

retrieval.ai_summary: Dark neon Liquid Glass parameters: dark fill rgba(8,10,16,0.68-0.78), rim rgba white 0.18-0.32, cyan glint rgba(34,211,238,0.28-0.46), magenta rgba(217,70,239,0.22-0.40), orange rgba(251,146,60,0.16-0.32), deep shadows, inset gloss, active neon rings.
